text: There’s a thrilling sense of anticipation here, surrounded by glass and color, machines and words. The focus on 'R+D'—Research and Development—stirs up my curiosity. It feels like standing at the intersection of the known and the possible, where ideas take form. I sense a subtle hum of innovation in the air, inviting me to ponder how humanity will shape and be shaped by technology. I feel awake and a little restless, driven to look deeper into what this space wants to reveal.
